Nigeria’s #1 Marketplacefor Buying & Selling

Welcome to 234Deals, Nigeria’s leading online marketplace where buyers and sellers connect effortlessly. From cars and real estate to electronics, fashion, and professional services, we make it simple to discover, buy, and sell everything you need—all in one convenient platform.

Start Today!

Let's get one thing straight:at 234Deals, every listingis worth your time.There's truly no such thingas a bad find!

Join thousands of happy buyers and sellers across Nigeria

Verified Sellers

All sellers verified for your safety and peace of mind

Safe Transactions

Your security is our top priority with encrypted payments.

24/7 Support

Our team is always here to help you succeed.

Easy Posting

List your items in minutes with our simple interface.
